bonus_rules.note: Bonus paid only when service is delivered, not at sale (per Jake intake)
Physician supervision split — placeholder rate; client to confirm

modmed_treatment_export.description: ModMed treatment notes export — daily CSV from ModMed PM
modmed_treatment_export.match_strategy: patient_id + appointment_id + service_date + cpt_code → match against outstanding package units; if cpt_code unmapped, fallback to procedure_description keyword match → human review queue
modmed_treatment_export.delivery: Phase 0: Tawny exports CSV from ModMed and emails it. Tier 2: scheduled SFTP / direct API.

csv_import_mappings._mapping_note: Codes here are illustrative. Real practice mapping is built during Tier 1 diagnostic — Tawny + Jake walk through last 30 days of completed event-package treatments and we map their actual ModMed codes to SKUs. ~50 codes typically cover 95% of volume.
